papers.title: Efficient training for compact compression models via sequential distillation
papers.title_zh: 通过顺序蒸馏实现紧凑压缩模型的高效训练
papers.abstract: Deep learning models for image compression often face practical limitations in hardware-constrained applications. Although these models achieve high-quality reconstructions, they are typically complex, heavyweight, and require substantial training data and computational resources. We propose a methodology to significantly reduce autoencoder-based compression networks in a more stable Knowledge Distillation process. The intuition is that highly reduced architectures benefit from simplified optimization objectives in early training, with complexity gradually introduced later. Therefore, our approach begins with a sequential encoder-decoder distillation stage that provides a robust initialization for the lightweight model. This is followed by standard training that can be regularized with latent distillation. We evaluate the resulting lightweight autoencoders across two different architectures on the image compression task. Experiments show that our method preserves reconstruction quality and statistical fidelity in early epochs better than training lightweight autoencoders with the original loss, making it practical for resource-limited environments.
papers.abstract_zh: 用于图像压缩的深度学习模型在硬件受限的应用场景中往往面临诸多实际限制。尽管这些模型能够实现高质量的重建，但它们通常结构复杂、计算开销大，并且需要大量的训练数据和算力。我们提出了一种方法，能够在更为稳定的知识蒸馏过程中显著压缩基于自编码器的压缩网络。其基本直觉在于，高度简化的网络架构在训练初期能够受益于更为简化的优化目标，随后再逐步引入模型复杂度。因此，我们的方法首先通过一个序列式的编码器-解码器蒸馏阶段，为轻量化模型提供稳健的初始化。随后是标准训练，该过程可通过潜在蒸馏进行正则化。

papers.title: Distributed Image Compression with Multimodal Side Information at Extremely Low Bitrates
papers.title_zh: 具有极低比特率的多模态边信息的分布式图像压缩
papers.abstract: Distributed Image Compression (DIC) is crucial for multi-view transmission, especially when operating at extremely low bitrates (< 0.1 bpp). Its core challenge is effectively utilizing side information to achieve high-quality reconstruction under strict bitrate budgets. However, existing DIC approaches struggle to exploit global context and object-level details from side information, leading to local blurring and the loss of fine details in the reconstruction. To address these limitations, we propose a Multimodal DIC framework (MDIC), which, for the first time, leverages side information in a multimodal manner into the DIC paradigm, effectively preserving fine-grained local details and enhancing global perceptual quality in reconstructed images.
papers.abstract_zh: 分布式图像压缩 (DIC) 对于多视图传输至关重要，尤其是在极低比特率 (< 0.1 bpp) 下运行时。它的核心挑战是有效地利用边信息在严格的比特率预算下实现高质量的重建。然而，现有的 DIC 方法难以利用来自边信息的全局上下文和对象级细节，导致局部模糊和重建中的精细细节的丢失。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种多模态 DIC 框架 (MDIC)，该框架首次以多模态方式利用辅助信息进入 DIC 范例，有效地保留了细粒度的局部细节并增强了重建图像中的全局感知质量。

papers.title: Degradation-Consistent Paired Training for Robust AI-Generated Image Detection
papers.title_zh: 面向鲁棒性人工智能生成图像检测的退化一致性成对训练
papers.abstract: AI-generated image detectors suffer significant performance degradation under real-world image corruptions such as JPEG compression, Gaussian blur, and resolution downsampling. We propose Degradation-Consistent Paired Training (DCPT), a simple yet effective training strategy that explicitly enforces robustness through paired consistency constraints. DCPT adds zero additional parameters and zero inference overhead. Experiments on the Synthbuster benchmark demonstrate that DCPT improves the degraded-condition average accuracy by 9.1 percentage points.
papers.abstract_zh: 在面对 JPEG 压缩、高斯模糊和分辨率下采样等真实场景中的图像退化时，人工智能生成图像检测器的性能会显著下降。我们提出了退化一致成对训练（DCPT），这是一种简单而有效的训练策略，通过成对的一致性约束显式地提升模型的鲁棒性。DCPT 不引入任何额外的参数，且推理开销为零。

papers.title: JLT: Clean-Latent Prediction in Latent Diffusion Transformers
papers.title_zh: JLT：潜在扩散变换器中的清洁潜在预测
papers.abstract: Flow matching with clean-data prediction has shown that regressing the clean point can exploit low-dimensional structure more effectively than predicting an ambient noised quantity. We introduce JLT, a 130M latent diffusion Transformer over frozen FLUX.2 VAE codes, and compare clean-latent prediction with a matched velocity-prediction DiT under the same representation, backbone, and training settings. On ImageNet 256x256, JLT-B/1 obtains FID-50K 2.50 with classifier-free guidance.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于干净数据预测的流匹配方法表明，回归干净样本点能够比直接预测高维空间中的噪声观测值更有效地利用低维结构。我们提出了 JLT，这是一种基于冻结的 FLUX.2 VAE 编码的 1.3 亿参数潜在扩散 Transformer，并在同一表示、主干网络和训练设置下，将纯潜在空间预测与对应的速度预测 DiT 进行了对比。在 ImageNet 256×256 数据集上，JLT-B/1 在无分类器指导条件下取得了 FID-50K 为 2.50 的性能。

papers.title: From Per-Image Low-Rank to Encoding Mismatch: Rethinking Feature Distillation in Vision Transformers
papers.title_zh: 从单张图像的低秩性到编码不匹配：重新审视视觉Transformer中的特征蒸馏
papers.abstract: Feature-map knowledge distillation (KD) transfers internal representations well between comparably sized Vision Transformers (ViTs), but it often fails in compression. We revisit this failure and uncover a paradox. We propose two minimal remedies, Lift or WideLast, that revive feature KD for ViT compression, improving DeiT-Tiny distilled from CaiT-S24 from 74.86% to 77.53%/78.23% top-1 accuracy.
papers.abstract_zh: 特征图知识蒸馏（KD）能够在尺寸相近的视觉 Transformer（ViT）之间较好地迁移内部表征，但在模型压缩任务中往往效果不佳。我们重新审视这一失败，并揭示了一个悖论。我们提出了两种最小化改进方法：Lift 和 WideLast，使特征蒸馏技术重新适用于 ViT 的压缩，将从 CaiT-S24 中蒸馏得到的 DeiT-Tiny 的 top-1 准确率由 74.86% 提升至 77.53%/78.23%。

papers.title: AdaMerge: Salience-Aware Adaptive Token Merging for Training-Free Acceleration of Vision Transformers
papers.title_zh: AdaMerge：面向视觉Transformer免训练加速的显著性感知自适应Token合并
papers.abstract: The quadratic cost of self-attention in Vision Transformers (ViTs) constitutes a fundamental bottleneck for practical deployment, motivating a vibrant line of research on token reduction. We address this limitation with AdaMerge, a token-merging framework based on two complementary mechanisms: salience-weighted similarity and adaptive merging intensity. On ImageNet-1k with ViT-B/16, AdaMerge consistently outperforms ToMe, PiToMe, and DSM across all FLOPs-matched regimes.
papers.abstract_zh: 视觉 Transformer 中自注意力的二次方开销是实际部署的根本瓶颈，推动了 token 减少的研究。我们提出了 AdaMerge，一个基于两个互补机制的 token 合并框架：显著性加权相似度和自适应合并强度。在 ImageNet-1k 上使用 ViT-B/16，AdaMerge 在所有 FLOPs 匹配的设置下均优于 ToMe、PiToMe 和 DSM。

papers.title: LIFT and PLACE: A Simple, Stable, and Effective Knowledge Distillation Framework for Lightweight Diffusion Models
papers.title_zh: LIFT and PLACE：面向轻量级扩散模型的简单稳定有效的知识蒸馏框架
papers.abstract: We demonstrate that in knowledge distillation for diffusion models, the teacher network's highly complex denoising process poses a significant challenge for the student model to faithfully mimic. We propose a coarse-to-fine distillation framework with LInear FiTting-based distillation (LIFT) and Piecewise Local Adaptive Coefficient Estimation (PLACE). Under extreme compression with a 1.3M-parameter student (only 1.6% of the teacher), our method remains stably convergent and achieves an FID of 15.73.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们证明了在扩散模型的知识蒸馏中，教师网络高度复杂的去噪过程对学生模型忠实模仿构成了重大挑战。我们提出了一个从粗到细的蒸馏框架，包含基于线性拟合的蒸馏（LIFT）和分段局部自适应系数估计（PLACE）。在仅 1.3M 参数学生模型（仅占教师模型 1.6%）的极端压缩下，我们的方法保持稳定收敛，FID 达到 15.73。

papers.title: Exploiting Semantic and Pixel Representations for Ultra-Low Bitrate Image Compression
papers.title_zh: 利用语义和像素表示的超低比特率图像压缩
papers.abstract: Most existing extreme compression methods fail to achieve an optimal rate-distortion-perception trade-off. We propose SPRDiff, a diffusion-based compression method that fully leverages both semantic and pixel representations, thereby enhancing reconstruction fidelity under ultra-low bitrate constraints. We develop a triple-encoder architecture and a distortion-aware reconstruction module with dual feature extraction. Experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art approaches at extremely low bitrates (below 0.03 bpp).
papers.abstract_zh: 现有大多数极端压缩方法未能实现最优的率-失真-感知权衡。我们提出了 SPRDiff，一种基于扩散的压缩方法，充分挖掘语义和像素表示，从而在超低比特率约束下提升重建质量。我们开发了一种三重编码器架构和具有双特征提取功能的失真感知重建模块。实验表明，我们的方法在极低比特率（低于 0.03 bpp）下优于现有最佳方法。

papers.title: Real-Time Generation of Streamable Talking Portrait Video with Reference-Guided Deep Compression VAEs
papers.title_zh: 基于参考引导深度压缩VAE的可流式传输说话人像视频实时生成
papers.abstract: Video diffusion models have significantly advanced portrait video generation, yet their high computational demands limit their use in interactive applications. This work presents a framework for streamable talking portrait video generation conditioned on speech audio and reference images. It features a causal video VAE for deep latent compression and an autoregressive latent denoising model. Our method enables the real-time generation of high-quality talking portrait videos.
papers.abstract_zh: 视频扩散模型在肖像视频生成方面取得了显著进展，但其高计算需求限制了其在交互式应用中的使用。本研究提出了一个基于语音音频和参考图像生成可流式传输说话人像视频的框架。该框架专为流式场景设计，包含一个用于深度潜空间压缩的因果视频 VAE 和一个自回归潜空间去噪模型。我们的方法实现了高质量说话人像视频的实时生成。

papers.title: ChWDTA: Channel-wise Wavelet-Domain Transformer Attention and Entropy Modeling for Learned Image Compression
papers.title_zh: ChWDTA：用于端到端可学习图像压缩的通道级小波域Transformer注意力和熵建模
papers.abstract: State-of-the-art learned image compression (LIC) schemes are increasingly based on hybrid CNN-transformer architectures. We introduce channel-wise wavelet transforms into both the transformer and entropy-coding components. We propose a channel-wise wavelet-domain transformer attention (ChWDTA) mechanism and a channel-wise wavelet packet (ChWP) decomposition for entropy coding. The proposed scheme obtains BD-rate reductions of -17.82%, -19.15%, and -22.56% on the Kodak, CLIC Professional Validation, and Tecnick test sets, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 最先进的端到端可学习图像压缩（LIC）方案越来越多地基于混合 CNN-Transformer 架构。我们将通道级小波变换引入到 Transformer 和熵编码组件中。我们提出了通道级小波域 Transformer 注意力（ChWDTA）机制和用于熵编码的通道级小波包（ChWP）分解。所提出的方案在 Kodak、CLIC Professional Validation 和 Tecnick 测试集上分别获得了 -17.82%、-19.15% 和 -22.56% 的 BD-rate 降低。

papers.title: Training-Free Continuous Bitrate Control for Scalable Image Coding for Humans and Machines
papers.title_zh: 面向人类和机器的可伸缩图像编码的免训练连续码率控制
papers.abstract: Continuous variable-rate compression is highly demanded in real-world applications, but remains underexplored in scalable image coding for humans and machines. We propose a training-free variable-rate scalable image coding framework. By adjusting quantization steps based on predicted scale values, the proposed method achieves continuous bitrate control while preserving high-scale information in the machine and enhancement layers.
papers.abstract_zh: 连续可变码率压缩在实际应用中需求强烈，但在面向人类和机器的可伸缩图像编码中仍缺乏充分探索。本文提出了一种免训练的可变码率可伸缩图像编码框架。该方法通过基于预测的缩放值调整量化步长，在保持机器层和增强层中高尺度信息的同时实现连续码率控制。

papers.title: HyperVQ: Enabling Hyperprior Entropy Modeling for VQ-Based Generative Image Compression
papers.title_zh: HyperVQ：面向基于VQ的生成式图像压缩的超先验熵建模
papers.abstract: Vector Quantization (VQ) based generative image compression has achieved remarkable perceptual quality. However, existing VQ codecs suffer from two fundamental limitations: lack of efficient content-adaptive entropy modeling and the inherent conflict between discrete indices and continuous priors. We propose HyperVQ, a principled framework that establishes a high-performance hyperprior entropy foundation for VQ-based codecs. Experiments demonstrate that HyperVQ achieves an average bitrate saving of 18.5%, which is 7.28x the saving achieved by conventional Huffman coding.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于矢量量化（VQ）的生成式图像压缩已取得显著的感知质量。然而，现有的 VQ 编解码器存在两个根本性局限：缺乏高效的内容自适应熵建模，以及离散索引与连续先验之间的固有冲突。我们提出了 HyperVQ，一个为 VQ 编解码器建立高性能超先验熵基础的原理性框架。实验表明，HyperVQ 平均比特率节省达 18.5%，是传统霍夫曼编码节省量的 7.28 倍。

papers.title: ChannelTok: Efficient Flexible-Length Vision Tokenization
papers.title_zh: ChannelTok：高效的灵活长度视觉标记化
papers.abstract: Leading flexible vision tokenizers achieve SOTA quality at an extreme cost. We introduce a simple, lightweight, and fast channel-wise flexible-length tokenizer. Our method treats each latent channel as a visual token, enabling a parameter-efficient CNN-Transformer hybrid backbone. Our model achieves state-of-the-art perceptual quality (rFID 2.92) while being 8.6x faster in decoding and 2.1x smaller (159M params) than the next-best alternative.
papers.abstract_zh: 领先的灵活视觉标记化方法在极端成本下实现了最先进的质量。我们引入了一种简单、轻量且快速的通道级灵活长度标记化器。我们的方法将每个潜在通道视为一个视觉标记，实现了参数高效的 CNN-Transformer 混合骨干网络。我们的模型实现了最先进的感知质量（rFID 2.92），同时解码速度提高 8.6 倍，参数规模更小（159M 参数）。

papers.title: Balancing Image Compression and Generation with Bootstrapped Tokenization
papers.title_zh: 利用自举分词平衡图像压缩与生成
papers.abstract: Despite progress in image tokenization, standard methods encode redundant information by mixing all granularities within each token. This paper introduces SelfBootTok, a method that cleanly decomposes information into global and local token groups. Through self-bootstrapped learning, the model predicts local details exclusively from global tokens, shifting the burden of visual details from the generator to the tokenizer. SelfBootTok achieves a new state-of-the-art gFID score of 1.56 using only 64 tokens.
papers.abstract_zh: 尽管图像分词技术取得了进展，但标准方法通过在每个 token 内混合所有粒度来编码冗余信息。本文提出了 SelfBootTok 方法，通过将信息清晰分解为全局 token 组和局部 token 组来解决这一问题。通过自引导学习，模型仅从全局 token 预测局部细节，将视觉细节的负担从生成器转移到分词器。SelfBootTok 仅使用 64 个 token 就实现了 1.56 的最先进 gFID 分数。

papers.title: Lossy Image Compression with Conditional Diffusion Models
papers.title_zh: 基于条件扩散模型的有损图像压缩
papers.abstract: Yang and Mandt's CDC (Conditional Diffusion Compression) replaces the deterministic VAE/Gaussian decoder in learned image compression with a conditional diffusion decoder. It follows transform coding: the image is first mapped by an encoder to an entropy-codable content latent z, and the decoder only transmits z, then uses a conditional diffusion model to synthesize texture latent and reconstruct the image. CDC uses X-prediction to make diffusion compression usable with few decoding steps (17 steps main experiment). It introduces LPIPS perceptual loss weight rho, forming a bitrate/distortion/perception three-way trade-off.
papers.abstract_zh: Yang 和 Mandt 的 CDC（条件扩散压缩）将学习式图像压缩中的确定性 VAE/高斯解码器替换为条件扩散解码器。它遵循变换编码：图像先由编码器映射到可熵编码的内容隐变量 z，解码端只传输 z，再由条件扩散模型合成纹理隐变量并重建图像。CDC 使用 X-prediction 使扩散压缩在少量解码步内可用（主实验 17 步）。引入 LPIPS 感知损失权重 rho，形成比特率/失真/感知三方权衡。
papers.summary_zh: CDC 是将扩散模型引入图像压缩的先驱性工作。核心创新在于用条件扩散解码器替代传统的确定性 VAE 解码器，将图像压缩分解为内容存储（隐变量 z）和纹理生成（扩散过程）两个阶段。在 Kodak、Tecnick、DIV2K、COCO2017 上用 16 个指标评估，CDC rho=0.9 在多个感知指标尤其 FID 上优于 HiFiC，CDC rho=0 在 FSIM、SSIM、MS-SSIM 等失真指标上接近强 VAE baseline。主要局限是解码速度慢（836ms@1080P）。

papers.title: High-Fidelity Generative Image Compression
papers.title_zh: 高保真生成式图像压缩
papers.abstract: HiFiC is a pioneering work in generative image compression that uses a generative adversarial network to achieve high perceptual quality at very low bitrates. It introduces a three-way trade-off between bitrate, distortion, and perception, demonstrating that generative models can produce visually pleasing reconstructions even when pixel-level fidelity is sacrificed.
papers.abstract_zh: HiFiC 是生成式图像压缩的先驱性工作，使用生成对抗网络在极低码率下实现高感知质量。它引入了比特率、失真和感知之间的三方权衡，证明即使在牺牲像素级保真度的情况下，生成模型仍能产生视觉上令人愉悦的重建结果。
papers.summary_zh: HiFiC 开创了生成式图像压缩范式：在极低码率下，不追求像素级精确重建，而是利用 GAN 的生成先验合成视觉上逼真的图像。核心贡献在于明确了率-失真-感知三方权衡理论，并提供了实操方案。HiFiC 是 CDC、PerCo、StableCodec 等后续工作的直接前驱。

papers.title: AEIC: Ultra-Low Bitrate Perceptual Image Compression with Shallow Encoder
papers.title_zh: AEIC：具有浅层编码器的超低码率感知图像压缩
papers.abstract: AEIC belongs to the ultra-low bitrate perceptual image compression (< 0.05 bpp) domain, at the intersection of generative image compression and asymmetric codec architectures. It proves that at ultra-low bitrates, encoder complexity can be exponentially reduced (rate↓ → latent variance↓ → encoding complexity exponentially decreases). The AEIC framework uses a shallow encoder + one-step diffusion decoder with dual-side feature distillation from AEIC-ME to AEIC-SE. The 0.94M parameter encoder achieves 35.8 FPS @ 1080P encoding.
papers.abstract_zh: AEIC 属于「超低码率感知图像压缩」(< 0.05 bpp) 领域，落在「生成式图像压缩」与「非对称编解码架构」的交叉地带。它证明了超低码率下编码复杂度需求指数级降低（码率↓ → 隐变量方差↓ → 编码复杂度指数缩减）。AEIC 框架使用浅编码器 + 一步扩散解码器，通过双侧面特征蒸馏从 AEIC-ME 向 AEIC-SE 知识迁移。0.94M 参数编码器实现 35.8 FPS @ 1080P 编码。
papers.summary_zh: AEIC 是 StableCodec 的编码器轻量化扩展版，核心创新在于：(1) 理论证明超低码率下浅层编码器可行性；(2) 非对称架构：浅编码器 + 一步扩散解码器；(3) 双侧面特征蒸馏实现知识迁移。演进脉络：PerCo (ICLR 2024) → StableCodec (ICCV 2025) → AEIC (CVPR 2026)。适用于边缘设备、IoT 等带宽和计算都受限的发送端场景。

papers.title: DiffJSCC: Diffusion-Aided Joint Source Channel Coding for High Realism Wireless Image Transmission
papers.title_zh: DiffJSCC：面向高真实感无线图像传输的扩散辅助联合信源信道编码
papers.abstract: DiffJSCC is the first work to integrate Stable Diffusion into Deep Joint Source-Channel Coding (Deep JSCC), aiming to solve the poor perceptual quality of traditional deep JSCC under bandwidth-constrained and low SNR conditions. It uses a pretrained Stable Diffusion model's generative prior to 'repair' low-quality initial JSCC reconstruction through conditional diffusion denoising, with multimodal condition control combining visual features, text captions, and channel state information (CSI).
papers.abstract_zh: DiffJSCC 是首个将 Stable Diffusion 整合入深度联合信源信道编码（Deep JSCC）的工作，旨在解决传统 deep JSCC 在带宽受限和低 SNR 条件下图像感知质量差的问题。它利用预训练 Stable Diffusion 模型的强大生成先验，通过条件扩散过程"修复"低质量的初始 JSCC 重建，结合视觉特征、文本 caption 和信道状态信息（CSI）联合引导扩散去噪。
papers.summary_zh: DiffJSCC 的核心洞察：在极端压缩场景下，不追求完美重建原图，而是利用 SD 生成先验"修复"低质量初始重建。关键创新：(1) 多模态条件控制（视觉+文本+CSI）；(2) 控制模块微调（冻结 SD 主干，仅微调轻量 Controller）；(3) 可选中间引导在真实感和保真度间平衡。在 1dB SNR AWGN 信道下，仅用 3072 个符号（< 0.008 symbols/pixel）即可重建 768×512 像素的 Kodak 图像。

papers.title: DeepJSCC: Deep Joint Source-Channel Coding for Wireless Image Transmission
papers.title_zh: DeepJSCC：面向无线图像传输的深度联合信源信道编码
papers.abstract: DeepJSCC is the first end-to-end deep JSCC: a CNN encoder directly maps image pixels to complex channel symbols, which are transmitted over a physical channel and reconstructed by a CNN decoder. It eliminates the cliff effect: performance degrades smoothly with SNR rather than collapsing abruptly. At low SNR, it significantly outperforms separation schemes (PSNR +3-8 dB vs JPEG+LDPC at 0-5 dB SNR).
papers.abstract_zh: DeepJSCC 是首个端到端深度 JSCC：CNN 编码器直接将图像像素映射为复数信道符号，经物理信道传输后由 CNN 解码器重建。它消除了悬崖效应：性能随 SNR 平滑退化，而非断崖式崩溃。在低 SNR 下显著优于分离方案（PSNR +3-8 dB vs JPEG+LDPC，0-5 dB SNR）。
papers.summary_zh: DeepJSCC 的架构：输入图像 → CNN Encoder (Conv + PReLU + Normalization) → 信道符号 z (满足功率约束) → AWGN/Rayleigh 信道 → CNN Decoder → 重建图像。核心贡献：(1) 首个端到端深度 JSCC；(2) 消除悬崖效应；(3) 低 SNR 下显著优于分离方案。这是后续 DiffJSCC、AIB-JSCC 等工作的基础。

papers.title: AIB-JSCC: Adaptive Information Bottleneck Guided Joint Source and Channel Coding for Image Transmission
papers.title_zh: AIB-JSCC：自适应信息瓶颈引导的图像传输联合信源信道编码
papers.abstract: Existing Deep JSCC methods only optimize reconstruction distortion under a fixed number of channels, ignoring transmission rate minimization. AIB-JSCC extends the Information Bottleneck principle from supervised learning to unsupervised image transmission, simultaneously minimizing transmission rate I(x;y) and maximizing reconstruction quality I(x;ŷ). It uses a PID controller to dynamically adjust the hyperparameter β, automatically balancing compression and quality.
papers.abstract_zh: 现有 Deep JSCC 方法在固定信道数量下只优化重建失真，忽视传输速率的最小化。AIB-JSCC 将信息瓶颈原理从监督学习扩展到无监督图像传输任务，同时最小化传输速率 I(x;y) 和最大化重建质量 I(x;ŷ)。使用 PID 控制器动态调整超参数 β，自动平衡压缩与质量。
papers.summary_zh: AIB-JSCC 的核心 Insight：将信息瓶颈（IB）原理从监督学习扩展到无监督图像传输。新目标函数 I(x;ŷ) - β·I(x;y) 同时优化双目标。创新点：(1) 新目标函数；(2) 可计算变分下界 + CLUB 上界使 IB 目标可微可导；(3) PID 控制器自适应压缩；(4) 首次将 IB 原理应用于图像传输。类比理解：传统 JSCC 像是不管文件大小，只管解压后好不好看；AIB-JSCC 则是在保证解压质量的前提下，自动找到能传输的最小文件大小。

papers.title: DecQ: Detail-Condensing Query Tokens for VFM-based Tokenizers
papers.title_zh: DecQ：面向VFM标记化器的细节压缩查询Token
papers.abstract: DecQ introduces 8 lightweight detail-condensing query tokens (+3.9% FLOPs) to condense low-level detail information from frozen VFM's intermediate layers, significantly improving reconstruction quality (PSNR 19.13→22.76 dB) while enhancing generation performance (FID 1.41 unguided / 1.05 guided), fundamentally solving the reconstruction-generation trade-off problem of RAE.
papers.abstract_zh: DecQ 通过引入 8 个轻量 detail-condensing query tokens（+3.9% FLOPs），从冻结 VFM 的中间层 condense 低层细节信息，在保持语义 latent space 不被污染的前提下大幅提升重建质量（PSNR 19.13→22.76 dB），同时提升生成性能（FID 1.41 无引导/1.05 有引导），从根本上解决了 RAE 的重建-生成 trade-off 问题。
papers.summary_zh: DecQ 是第一个在 VFM-based tokenizer 范式下同时提升重建质量和生成质量的方法。架构：图像→冻结 VFM encoder→中间层特征送入 condenser (cross-attention + FFN)→产出 detail-condensing queries (8 tokens)→与 patch tokens 拼接→Transformer decoder→重建。关键：Query tokens 从 shallow layers condense 的信息→改善重建；从 deep layers condense 的信息→改善生成。Encoder: DINOv2 ViT-B/14 (冻结), Decoder: ViT-MAE XL (28层)。

papers.title: Emerging Advances in Learned Video Compression: Models, Systems and Beyond
papers.title_zh: 学习式视频压缩的新兴进展：模型、系统及展望
papers.abstract: This survey focuses on end-to-end optimized Learned Video Compression (LVC), systematically reviewing the evolution from traditional hybrid coding frameworks to fully neural network-based coding. It covers unidirectional prediction (P-frame based) and bidirectional prediction (B-frame based) LVC model design, six major optimization technology directions, system design and hardware implementation, experimental evaluation and standardization progress.
papers.abstract_zh: 该综述聚焦于端到端优化的学习式视频压缩（LVC），系统梳理了从传统混合编码框架到全神经网络编码的演进路径。覆盖单向预测（P-frame based）和双向预测（B-frame based）LVC 模型设计、六大优化技术方向、系统设计与硬件实现、实验评测与标准化进展。时间范围主要从 2018 年（Wu et al., ECCV 2018）到 2024 年（DCVC-FM, EEV-0.5 等最新模型）。
papers.summary_zh: 综述覆盖范围：端到端优化的学习式视频压缩。核心内容包括：(1) 单向预测 LVC 模型设计；(2) 双向预测 LVC 模型设计；(3) 六大优化技术方向；(4) 系统设计与硬件实现；(5) 实验评测与标准化进展。该综述侧重于信号保真度导向的端到端视频压缩，对轮廓/边缘/语义驱动压缩的覆盖较为有限。

papers.title: 红外图像、轮廓图像与自然图像的分类学对比及压缩约束分析
papers.title_zh: 红外图像、轮廓图像与自然图像的分类学对比及压缩约束分析
authors: 研究综述 AI 助手
papers.abstract: This study systematically compares four types of images (natural, infrared, general contour, infrared contour) in terms of physical imaging mechanisms, statistical distributions, and information entropy characteristics. It analyzes the inherent advantages and disadvantages of natural image compression, identifies four special constraints faced by infrared image compression (high bit-depth, low texture high noise, small target sensitivity, thermal edge non-gradient edge), and reviews known compression schemes. The study identifies three knowledge gaps: lack of unified quantitative classification framework, lack of systematic research on infrared contour image dedicated schemes, and incomplete task-driven compression evaluation systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文系统对比了四类图像（自然图像、红外图像、普通轮廓图像、红外轮廓图像）的物理成像机制、统计分布和信息熵特征，分析了自然图像压缩的内在优势与劣势，识别了红外图像压缩面临的四类特殊约束（高 bit-depth、低纹理高噪声、小目标敏感性、热边缘非梯度边缘），并综述了已知压缩方案的适用场景。研究识别了三个知识缺口：缺乏统一定量分类框架、红外轮廓图专用方案缺乏系统研究、任务驱动压缩评价体系不完善。
papers.summary_zh: 核心发现：(1) 四类图像的本质区别源于物理成像机制——可见光反射 vs 热辐射 vs 边缘提取结果；(2) 自然图像压缩优势在于高纹理冗余和成熟感知模型，劣势在于高频信息浪费和任务无关；(3) 红外图像面临高 bit-depth、低纹理高噪声、小目标敏感性和热边缘非梯度边缘四类约束；(4) 压缩范式谱系包含传统编码、红外统计编码、学习式压缩、RGB-IR 联合压缩、任务驱动压缩和二值/轮廓编码六类方案。关键词：红外图像压缩、轮廓编码、图像分类学、任务驱动压缩、RGB-IR 联合压缩。

papers.title: 轮廓视频压缩调研：从 MPEG-4 二值形状编码到语义条件扩散
papers.title_zh: 轮廓视频压缩调研：从 MPEG-4 二值形状编码到语义条件扩散
authors: 研究综述 AI 助手
papers.abstract: A survey on contour video compression covering: Part 0 Introduction and problem definition; Part 1 Classical binary shape coding (MPEG-4 VOP, MC-TLCC, V-PCC); Part 2 Contour/segmentation mask assisted traditional video coding (Seg-VVC); Part 3 Learned contour compression (SA-NeRV, MoRIC); Part 4 Semantic video compression with contour as conditional signal (DiSCo, MMSD/SAMR, MISC); Part 5 Edge-cloud collaboration with binary sketch transmission (SketchVision); Part 6 Method comparison and open problems including infrared video contour compression.
papers.abstract_zh: 轮廓视频压缩调研，覆盖：Part 0 引言与问题定义；Part 1 经典路线——二值形状编码（MPEG-4 VOP、MC-TLCC、V-PCC）；Part 2 轮廓/分割 mask 辅助传统视频编码（Seg-VVC）；Part 3 学习式轮廓压缩（SA-NeRV、MoRIC）；Part 4 语义视频压缩——轮廓作为条件信号（DiSCo、MMSD/SAMR、MISC）；Part 5 边缘-云协同——二值草图传输（SketchVision）；Part 6 方法对比与开放问题（含红外视频轮廓压缩空白）。
papers.summary_zh: 综述结构为 7 部分，从经典二值形状编码到语义条件扩散，系统梳理轮廓视频压缩的演进。开放问题包括：红外视频轮廓压缩（空白领域）、端到端轮廓视频 codec、时域一致性。涉及论文：MPEG-4 Binary Shape Coding, MC-TLCC (SPIE 2002), V-PCC Occupancy (VCIP 2020), Seg-VVC (arXiv 2403.11694), SA-NeRV, MoRIC (NeurIPS 2025), DiSCo (CVPR 2026), MMSD, MISC, SketchVision 等。
